title: Troll Gui
description: "Troll Gui" is the ultimate trolling mod for Minecraft. With its user-friendly interface and a wide variety of trolling options, you can easily prank your friends. This mod features a wide range of trolling options.
body:
This mod adds:

-Troll items

-Custom commands (All commands can be executed without admin rights)

-Custom Gamerules

-And a bunch of tools to prank your friends!

 

 

Commands:

/z!Gui [This Opens the main Gui of the mod]

 

/z!Enchantoffhand [This command lets you enchant any item in offhand]

Usage1: true <Player> <Enchant> [True means its using the maximum amount of the Enchant]

Usage2: false <Player> <Enchant> <Ammount>

Use/z!Enchantoffhandhelp for help ingame.

 

/z!Putonplayer [This command lets you put any block on any players armor slots for example Diamond block on the head]

Usage: <Player> <Item> <Slot> [3=Head 2=Chest 1=Leggins 0=Boots]

Use /z!Putonplayerhelp for help ingame.

 

/z!Giveplayer [This command lets you give any player any item (And yes you can give yorself 99999 Diamonds) Just press "f" to put the items in main hand]

Usage: <Player> <Item> <Ammount>

 

/z!Runcommand

Usage:/z!Runcommand [Run as player] [Command between ""]

Use /z!Runcommandhelp for help ingame. 

 

/z!Crashworld [This command crashes the server not the client]

 

All items are explained if you press "Explain Items" in the main Gui (the explenation is in the chat)
